<!-- indicator: fig-mental-health-providers -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-mental-health-providers
#| fig-cap: 'Ratio of Residents to Mental Health Providers, 2021–2024'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Ratio of Residents to Mental Health Providers, 2021–2024.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-mental-health-providers", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
